description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and look‑around assertions. It is moderately challenging, encouraging learners to apply and deepen their regex skills through practical matching and validation tasks. The tone is supportive and motivational, urging continued practice to achieve mastery.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capture groups, Look‑around assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and students with introductory to intermediate experience in programming who want to improve their regex capabilities.
